variants.title: A411G15R
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec A411G15R. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the A411G15R provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 15µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 17µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 95.0 mm, Length: 154.0 mm, Thread: 1 3/8"-12 UNF 2B, Δ Collapse Pressure: 34 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 15µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Collapse Pressure: 34.5 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.option1Value: Donaldson P163542 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Filtrec A411G15R
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P163542 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On Duramax combines the convenience of a spin-on filter with the robust durability of Donaldsonâ€™s Duramax line. It offers high-efficiency filtration, effectively removing contaminants while withstanding high-pressure environments. Its spin-on design simplifies maintenance, allowing for quick and easy filter changes. Built for heavy-duty applications, this filter provides reliable performance in demanding hydraulic systems, helping to extend equipment life and reduce downtime.

variants.title: A411G15R
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter WH 945/1 Hydraulic Transmission Filter | Replaces the Filtrec A411G15R
variants.description: MANN-FILTER transmission oil filters ensure the purest oil and thus protect delicate transmissions against wear caused by impurities. The practical kit also includes the appropriate seal for the transmission oil pan, which should always be replaced during service.
